How to locate your feeder:

Load-shed Schedule
For the week of April 7 - April 14, 2021
To find the name of your respective feeder, download our app "KE Live" and click on the "Power" tab at the bottom.
You may also call 118 and ask the customer care representative to provide you with your Feeder name.
Kindly note that the below list of feeders will face load shedding.
Your area may also face localized faults related to PMT or feeders, for which KE teams are available 24/7
Disclaimer: The information in this file is for "information purposes" only. Whilst reasonable steps are taken to ensure the accuracy and integrity of the
information, please be aware that due to the dynamic nature of our business, this information may change from time to time. In the premise, KE makes no
representations or provides no warranties regarding the contents published. Viewers are requested to check the Information on this webpage periodically for any
changes/updates. For specific information pertaining to your respective feeder or any unscheduled outage, kindly, visit the KE Live App or dial 118 for further
details and complaint registration.Owing to uncontrollable factors including tripping of plant, unavailability of fuel, low gas pressure and spike in demand
contingency Low loss feeders (Con-LL) mentioned will be load shed for only one hour as per schedule.
Inconvenience regretted.
